prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **PIR Motion Brightness Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_bquwrqh1`
   - **Issue:** [Device Request - PIR Motion Brightness](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1351)
   - **Status:** Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **Presence Sensor Radar**
   - **Fingerprints:**
     - `_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8` (Driver: `presence_sensor_radar`)
     - `_TZ321C_fkzihax8` (Driver: `presence_sensor_radar`)
   - **Issue:** [Presence Sensor Radar Issue](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/97)
   - **Status:** Closed

2. **PIR Motion Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` (Driver: `motion_sensor`)
   - **Issue:** [Device Request - PIR Motion Brightness](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1351)
   - **Status:** Open

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #45**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status:** Merged

2. **PR #46**: [Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged

3. **PR #1350**: [TS110E Driver Addition](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)
   - **User:** PiTRiS87
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **Status:** Open

4. **PR #1253**: [Added 3 New Devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)
   - **User:** Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Open

5. **PR #1219**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status:** Open

6. **PR #1218**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status:** Open

7. **PR #1195**: [Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)
   - **User:** YuriEstevan
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
   - **Status:** Open

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting new device requests, existing support, and significant pull requests for integration.
